Default Prove-Up In Scd.

MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lisa Sarto.
William Marchant, Esq. for Plaintiffs: Michael R. Neal and Susan G. Neal.
Plaintiff's witness: Michael R. Neal was sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendants: Frances Kent Petersen, Robert D. Kent, Dale Childers and Diane I Kent, quieting title in the five-foot strip of land adjacent to the Plaintiff's property known as 2745 Lake Street, San Francisco, CA. See scanned doc. for details of Judgment.
Judgment signed in open court.
